title: Karnataka Board 10th Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Karnataka Board 10th Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Karnataka Board 10th Result 2026 declared for SSLC Exam-1 on the official website - karresults.nic.in on 23-04-2026. Students can use the direct link given here and follow the steps to download the Karnataka SSLC Class 10 result online using their registration number and date of birth.

content.text: The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) has officially released the Karnataka Board 10th Result 2026 for SSLC (Class 10) Exam-1 for the 2025-26 academic session. The SSLC result has been announced for all Class 10 students who appeared in the March-April 2026 board examinations conducted across Karnataka.

Karnataka Board 10th Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - karresults.nic.in. Students can now check and download their SSLC marks card by visiting the result portal and logging in with their registration number and date of birth as mentioned on their admit card. After downloading the provisional marksheet, students are advised to carefully verify their personal details, subject-wise marks, and overall result status, and contact the board or school authorities immediately in case of any discrepancy.

Karnataka Board has published the SSLC Exam-1 Result 2026 for Class 10 students on its official result portal for the 2025-26 academic session. Students can access their Karnataka SSLC Result 2026 online through karresults.nic.in by entering their registration number and date of birth in the login window. The online scorecard will act as a provisional marksheet until schools issue the original mark sheets.

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)
Registration Number and Date of Birth

content.text: Karnataka Board has activated the SSLC 10th Result 2026 direct link on the official result portal for all Exam-1 candidates. Students can instantly view or download their Karnataka Board Class 10 marks card by using the Karnataka SSLC Result 2026 direct link and logging in with their registration number and date of birth. The links given below take students to the official karresults.nic.in portal, where they can check their result online and save the provisional marksheet for future reference.

sections.heading: How to Check Karnataka Board 10th Result 2026 Online

content.text: Students can follow the step-by-step process given below to check Karnataka Board 10th Result 2026 on the official portal.

items: Visit the official Karnataka results website - karresults.nic.in using any browser.
On the homepage, click on the link that reads "Karnataka SSLC Main Examination Results 2026" or "SSLC Exam-1 Result 2026".
A login window for Karnataka SSLC Result 2026 will appear on the screen.
Enter your SSLC registration number and date of birth in the respective fields exactly as printed on the admit card.
Click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button to proceed.
Your Karnataka Board 10th Result 2026 marks card will be displayed on the screen with subject-wise marks and total score.
Download the online marksheet and take a printout for future reference until the original mark sheet is issued by the school.
